description:
The `ao://project/daemon-events` MCP resource (ops_mcp.rs:1960-1966) calls `read_daemon_events()` which reads the global `daemon-events.jsonl` file but does NOT filter by project_root — it returns the first N lines (head), not the most recent N (tail). This is inconsistent with the `ao.daemon.events` tool which correctly filters by project_root and returns the tail.

## Fix
1. In the resource handler `read_daemon_events()`, apply the same project_root filtering logic used by `poll_daemon_events()`.
2. Return the tail (most recent N events) not the head (oldest N events).
3. Pass the `default_project_root` from `AoMcpServer` to the resource reader.

## Key Files
- `crates/orchestrator-cli/src/services/operations/ops_mcp.rs` — lines 1960-1966 (resource handler), lines 1996+ (read_daemon_events), lines 3239-3255 (poll_daemon_events for reference)
title: Fix daemon-events MCP resource to filter by project_root and return tail
